summary: Tanjiro enters a palace power struggle as a low-ranking guard, trying to protect the vulnerable while tracking a demon hidden inside the court.

en.summary: Tanjiro enters a palace power struggle as a low-ranking guard, trying to protect the vulnerable while tracking a demon hidden inside the court.

zh.summary: 炭治郎误入宫廷，被安排成低阶侍卫，在礼法、谎言和派系斗争中追查潜入皇宫的鬼。
